description: Explore Münster on two wheels along its famous Promenade ring or riverside paths.

locationInfo.description: A 4.5 km tree-lined ring encircling the old city, beloved by cyclists and pedestrians alike.

description: Trek through forested trails on the outskirts of Münster and breathe in the fresh air.
groupSuitability: Great for individuals, couples, or small groups

locationInfo.lighting: Low lighting under tree canopy — bring a torch in winter
locationInfo.description: A network of well-marked trails through mixed woodland on the western edge of Münster.

description: Organise a casual kick-about on one of Münster's public sports fields.

locationInfo.description: Public football pitches with marked fields — first come, first served.
safetyTips: Check pitch availability during busy periods

description: Glide on the ice at Münster's main rink — great fun for all abilities in the winter months.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals, couples, and small groups

locationInfo.description: Münster's indoor ice rink offering public skating sessions throughout the winter season.

description: A low-impact full-body workout using poles along Münster's flat trails.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals or small groups

locationInfo.lighting: Well-lit paths suitable for early mornings
locationInfo.description: Flat, paved routes with minimal traffic — ideal for Nordic walking technique.
safetyTips: Use rubber tips on poles to protect pavement
Warm up wrists and shoulders first

description: Tackle bouldering walls and roped routes at Münster's climbing gym — great year-round.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals, couples, and small groups

locationInfo.description: Modern bouldering and lead-climbing walls suitable for all skill levels, from complete beginners to advanced climbers.
safetyTips: Complete safety briefing before first visit
Spot your partner on bouldering walls

description: Use GPS to hunt for hidden caches scattered around Münster's parks and landmarks.

locationInfo.lighting: Varies by cache location — most are accessible in daylight
locationInfo.description: Hundreds of geocaches hidden across Münster — from the city centre to forests and cycle paths.
safetyTips: Download the Geocaching app before you go
Return the cache exactly as found

description: Navigate using a map and compass through the forests around Münster in a self-timed challenge.
groupSuitability: Best for individuals or small groups

locationInfo.lighting: Low in dense sections — not recommended after dark
locationInfo.description: A dedicated orienteering area west of Münster with control points marked on specialist maps.
safetyTips: Carry a whistle and first aid kit

description: A gentle stroll through quiet woodland and fields, soaking up the natural surroundings.

locationInfo.lighting: Open reserve — good natural light in daytime
locationInfo.description: A UNESCO-recognised wetland reserve north of Münster, home to rare birds and wildflowers.
safetyTips: Stick to marked paths to protect nesting wildlife

description: Race through Münster solving clues at landmarks — a classic team-building adventure.
groupSuitability: Best for groups of 6 or more

locationInfo.description: Create a route linking the Prinzipalmarkt, Dom, Lambertikirche, and Rathaus for a fun city-wide hunt.
safetyTips: Keep groups together in busy areas
Carry a city map as backup

description: Spend the day at the award-winning Allwetterzoo Münster — one of Germany's best all-weather zoos.
groupSuitability: Great for families and groups of all sizes

locationInfo.description: A large all-weather zoo with covered walkways — enjoyable rain or shine, with over 300 animal species.
safetyTips: Keep children within sight at all times

description: Kick a ball around with friends for a fun, low-key game on the public fields.
groupSuitability: Best for small and large groups

locationInfo.description: Large open grass areas in Westpark often used for informal football games — no booking required.
safetyTips: Be mindful of other park users
No slide tackles on hard ground
Carry a basic first aid kit

description: Browse stalls, sip Glühwein, and enjoy the festive atmosphere of Münster's winter market.

locationInfo.description: One of Germany's most charming Christmas markets, set against the historic gabled townhouses of the Prinzipalmarkt.
safetyTips: Keep bags close in crowded areas
Be aware of open fire hazards near stalls
